name: cybershuttle
description: Manage SSH sessions, HPC jobs, Dev Tunnels, and remote storage from VS Code

cybershuttle.adminServerUrl.description: URL of the CS-Bridge admin server for metrics reporting.

cybershuttle.tunnelProvider.description: Tunnel provider for linkspan connections. 'devtunnel' uses Microsoft Dev Tunnels, 'frp' uses a self-hosted FRP relay.

cybershuttle.frpServerUrl.description: FRP relay server address (host:port). Required when tunnelProvider is 'frp'.

cybershuttle.frpApiKey.description: API key for the FRP relay server. Required when tunnelProvider is 'frp'.

cybershuttle.enableFilesystemSync.markdownDescription: **Experimental.** When enabled, CS-Bridge sets up overlay filesystems, FUSE mounts, and mutagen sync between local and remote workspaces. When disabled, sessions open a plain Remote-SSH window without any filesystem mounting or sync — the user browses remote files directly.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.dev: npm install && npm run compile && npm run package && npm run install-ext
